name: Feed
description: A scrollable section that automatically loads new content as the user scrolls, presenting content as a series of article elements.

keyboard_interactions.action: Move focus to the next article
Move focus to the previous article
Move focus to first focusable element after the feed
Move focus to first focusable element before the feed

roles.description: Identifies the container as a feed
Identifies each piece of content as an article

required_attributes.description: Provides accessible name for the feed
References elements providing a distinguishing label

optional_attributes.description: References the primary content elements of the article
Article's position number within the feed
Total number of loaded articles, or -1 if undetermined
true during loading; false when complete

notes: Each article should be a tab stop or contain focusable elements
Loading indicators should use aria-busy on the feed container
